content: If we embed a lightweight 2025 configurable Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) directly into the handshaking layer of the open Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol, cross-framework AI agents will spontaneously explore mutually useful coordination tasks that no human designer explicitly programmed, instead of only executing pre-specified workflows. This curiosity-driven discovery layer can unlock emergent collaborative capabilities between heterogeneous agents that are invisible to top-down task design.
